title: Multiplexed Imaging Mass Cytometry of Chemokine Milieus in Metastatic Melanoma - Data for Analysis
author: Hoch, Tobias
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The following folders/files are part of this repository: 

 
	 Zip-Archive " MelanomaIMC-Zenodo ": contains all code that is available as  Github  release

	 
		 Folder " analysis ": contains all .rmd files that are required to generate the SingleCellExperiment object with single-cell data required to reproduce all figures 
		 Folder " code ": contains all helper functions required for the analysis pipeline
		 
			 Folder " celltype_classifier ": contains scripts to load all images and masks to start the cytomapper Shiny application to generate labeled data for the random forest classifier 
			 Folder " helper_functions ": all R helper functions (such as patch/milieu detection, etc)  
			 Folder " data ": empty, store data folders here (" data_for_analysis " and " full_data ") 
			 Folder " docs ": all .html files generated from the scripts stored in the " analysis"  folder. Contains also all panels from the figures as .pdf or .png 
			 Folder " output ": empty 
		 
		 
	 
	 
	 Zip-Archive " data_for_analysis ": contains processed data such as SingleCellExperiment objects, clinical data tables, labeled data for the random forest classifier, etc
	 
		 Folder " 12plex_validation":  data used to validate the RNAScope 12-plex system 
		 Folder " ClustalW_results ": data used to generate Fig S6G (Sequence similarity of RNAScope targets) 
		 Folder " protein ": all data for the Protein data set (single-cell expression data, channel order, labeled data for the random forest classifier, clinical data table, etc)  
		 Folder " rna ": same as protein folder but for the RNA&Protein data set 
		 Folder " scRNAseq ": scRNA-seq data required to generate Fig. S7A 
		 Files " sce_*.rds ": R objects containing the SingleCellExperiment container with all single-cell data and metadata, used for all R analyses.  
		 File " HPA_rna_celline.tsv ": data used to generate Fig. S3B, bulk RNA seq data from cell-lines, Human Protein Atlas

	 Zip-Archive " MelanomaIMC-Zenodo ": contains all code that is available as  Github  release

	 
		 Folder " analysis ": contains all .rmd files that are required to generate the SingleCellExperiment object with single-cell data required to reproduce all figures

			 Folder " docs ": all .html files generated from the scripts stored in the " analysis"  folder. Contains also all panels from the figures as .pdf or .png
